ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., Charter) */,
  "school_type_category" TEXT /* Category for the school type (e.g., Elementary, Middle, High) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "budget_per_student" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district the school belongs to */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Official website of the school */,
  "school_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "school_principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., SAT, ACT, State Test) */,
  "test_year" INTEGER /* Year the test was taken */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test (e.g., Math, Reading, Science) */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the students who took the test */,
  "passing_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students who passed the test */,
  "avg_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "avg_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "passing_math_pct" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_pct" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the budget */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget report */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category for the budget (e.g., Salaries, Facilities, Resources) */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the year */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the budget category */,
  "actual_spent" REAL /* Actual amount spent for the budget category */,
  "budget_per_student" REAL /* Budget allocated per student for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id", "school_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Analyst, Educator) */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Read, Write, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the school year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the school year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_year_id")
)
